name: Template Creator
description: Create and update personal artifact template skills. Turn DOCX, PPTX, and XLSX references into reusable personal template skills, or update an existing personal artifact template.

tools.name: template_creator_guide
tools.description: Explain what the Template Creator plugin does and how to use its template-creator skill (create or update a personal artifact template from a DOCX, PPTX, or XLSX reference). Call this to orient before starting a Template Creator task.

defaultPrompt: Create a personal template from this document
Create a personal template from this presentation
Create a personal template from this spreadsheet
